name: dynamic-workflows
description: Codex-native planning, fan-out, review, and status workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, fan out, verify, and synthesize large Codex tasks.
interface.longDescription: Dynamic Workflows provides instruction-only Codex skills for safely scoping large tasks, coordinating read-heavy parallel work, reviewing findings, and reporting evidence-backed status.
defaultPrompt: Plan this task as a Dynamic Workflow.
Summarize workflow status and next actions.
